title: Beef and Peruvian Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry made with ground beef, peruvian seasoning, and crispy elements. Serve as a dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the peruvian seasoning, soy sauce, and crispy rice.
Add the sliced bitter gourd to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve the beef and vegetable mixture hot, garnished with additional crispy rice if desired.
Cook to an internal temperature of 160°F (71°C) to ensure food safety.
